heading: Definitions
label: 10601 Definitions
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in introductory provisions, was in the original “this title” and was translated as reading “this subtitle”, meaning subtitle A (§§ 5101–5109) of title LI of div. E of , , , known as the United States Foundation for International Conservation Act of 2024, which is classified generally to this chapter.Pub. L. 118–159138 Stat. 2410Dec. 23, 2024

children.label: A
children.text: the Committee on Foreign Relations of the Senate;

children.label: B
children.text: the Committee on Appropriations of the Senate;

children.label: C
children.text: the Committee on Foreign Affairs of the House of Representatives; and

children.label: D
children.text: the Committee on Appropriations of the House of Representatives.
The term “Board” means the Board of Directors established pursuant to .section 10603(b) of this title
The term “eligible country” means any country described in .section 10606(b) of this title
The term “eligible project” means any project described in .section 10606(a)(3) of this title
The term “Executive Director” means the Executive Director of the Foundation hired pursuant to .section 10603 of this title
The term “Foundation” means the United States Foundation for International Conservation established pursuant to .section 10602(a) of this title
The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of State.
